articles.title: Your CVR Is Up But AOV Dropped. The 4-Domain Fix for EC Revenue
articles.description: CVR and AOV tend to move in opposite directions. Coupons push CVR up but drop AOV. Free-shipping thresholds push AOV up but drop CVR. This guide covers the joint-lift framework, four compatible domains, phase-based priorities, and measurement pitfalls.
